data.body:
Good public transportation is what I miss now, having grown up in Europe.
Lived in Vienna for a decade, didn't need to own a car.
Lived in more rural areas, mostly didn't need my car.
Went on vacations all over Europe by train.
In GA, I'd need to drive 25 minutes to get to a bus stop.
